full_development: All short-screen survivors receive four-burn 100-year evaluation.
pareto_replay: Every nondominated full configuration, up to four total, receives the additional burns needed for one eight-burn replay; earlier identical burn results are reused rather than rerun.
short_screen: Within each class, configurations must be complete and mandatory-stratum-available; the two lowest median normalized distances survive, with exact ties broken by configuration_id. The complete short-screen ledger remains published.
